email_preview.subject: built something for D&D Mobile Car Detailing
email_preview.body:
Hey there,

I'm a concrete worker out of Kansas City - Local 1290. I've been learning web design at night and building free sites for local businesses to grow my portfolio.

I noticed D&D Mobile Car Detailing doesn't have a website so I built you one. Took me a few hours. No charge to look at it:

[link will be inserted on send]

If you love it, I'll finish the full build for a flat fee. If not, no hard feelings - keep the design.

Either way I hope it helps.

- Matthew Herrman
HOO - Kansas City, MO
(804) 957-1003
herrmanonlineoutlook.com

social_captions.facebook:
Built D&D Mobile Car Detailing's entire homepage — completely free for them to see first.

They're a auto detailing business in Lee's Summit, MO. No website before this. Now they've got a full site with real photos, mobile layout, animations, booking CTA — everything.

They paid nothing until they saw it live and loved it. That's HOO. Build free. Pay on approval.
